metadata.description: The indie Apple developer stack: Apple platform skills now, SwiftShip workflow commands to follow.

plugins.name: apple-skills
plugins.description: 147 Apple platform development skills across 23 categories (iOS, macOS, watchOS, visionOS): code generators, product workflow, App Store/ASO, testing and TDD, design, performance, security, and more. Surfaced as 23 category skills that route to the full library.
